field.name: show_title
field.label: Show Title
field.description: Show the component title on the frontend

field.name: items_per_page
field.label: Items Per Page
field.description: Number of items to display per page in lists

field.name: default_order_status
field.label: Default Order Status
field.description: Default status for new orders

field.name: auto_assign_technicians
field.label: Auto Assign Technicians
field.description: Automatically assign technicians to new orders

field.name: enable_calendar_view
field.label: Enable Calendar View
field.description: Enable calendar view in the dashboard

field.name: anulacion_url
field.label: Order Cancellation URL
field.description: External form URL for order cancellation requests. Parameters user_id, orden_id and requester are appended automatically.

field.name: telegram_enabled
field.label: Enable Telegram notifications
field.description: Master switch for sending alerts via the Telegram Bot API.

field.name: telegram_bot_token
field.label: Bot API token
field.description: Token from @BotFather. Leave blank when saving to keep the existing token.

field.name: telegram_notify_invoice
field.label: Notify: new invoice
field.description: Notify the work-order owner when a new invoice is created or imported.

field.name: telegram_notify_envio
field.label: Notify: envío issued
field.description: Notify the work-order owner when a shipping slip (envío) is generated.

field.name: telegram_notify_payment_proof_entered
field.label: Notify: payment proof entered
field.description: Notify the work-order owner when a new payment proof is registered.

field.name: telegram_notify_payment_proof_verified
field.label: Notify: payment proof verified
field.description: Notify the work-order owner when a payment proof is marked as verified.

field.name: telegram_message_invoice
field.label: Invoice notification message
field.description: Optional custom DM text for invoice alerts. Leave empty for the default template.

field.name: telegram_message_envio
field.label: Envío notification message
field.description: Optional custom DM text for envío alerts. Leave empty for the default template.

field.name: telegram_message_payment_proof_entered
field.label: Payment proof entered (DM) message
field.description: Optional custom DM text when a payment proof is entered.

field.name: telegram_message_payment_proof_verified
field.label: Payment proof verified (DM) message
field.description: Optional custom DM text when a payment proof is verified.

field.name: telegram_broadcast_chat_id
field.label: Channel chat ID (Administración feed)
field.description: Numeric chat ID for the Administración Telegram channel (usually starts with -100). Add the bot as channel admin before testing.

field.name: telegram_broadcast_invoice
field.label: Broadcast invoice alerts to this channel
field.description: If Yes, new-invoice notifications are also queued for the Administración channel.

field.name: telegram_broadcast_envio
field.label: Broadcast envío alerts to this channel
field.description: If Yes, envío notifications are also queued for the Administración channel.

field.name: telegram_broadcast_payment_proof_entered
field.label: Broadcast payment proof entered to this channel
field.description: If Yes, new payment proof notifications are queued for the Administración channel.

field.name: telegram_broadcast_payment_proof_verified
field.label: Broadcast payment proof verified to this channel
field.description: If Yes, verified payment proof notifications are queued for the Administración channel.

field.name: telegram_broadcast_message_invoice
field.label: Channel invoice message
field.description: Optional text used only for the Administración channel invoice notification.

field.name: telegram_broadcast_message_envio
field.label: Channel envío message
field.description: Optional text used only for the Administración channel envío notification.

field.name: telegram_broadcast_message_payment_proof_entered
field.label: Channel: payment proof entered message
field.description: Optional channel-only text for payment proof entered notifications.

field.name: telegram_broadcast_message_payment_proof_verified
field.label: Channel: payment proof verified message
field.description: Optional channel-only text for payment proof verified notifications.

field.name: telegram_queue_cron_key
field.label: Cron secret key
field.description: Secret for the Telegram queue URL (?cron_key=…). Leave blank when saving to keep the current key.

field.name: telegram_mismatch_anchor_enabled
field.label: Mismatch ticket: Telegram anchor DMs
field.description: When a payment proof has a totals mismatch, send anchor DMs to linked order owners with Telegram linked.

field.name: telegram_webhook_public_base
field.label: Webhook public base URL (optional)
field.description: HTTPS origin where Telegram POSTs updates (e.g. https://telegram.grantsolutions.cc). No trailing slash.

field.name: telegram_webhook_secret
field.label: Bot webhook secret
field.description: Must match secret_token in Telegram setWebhook. Leave empty to reject all webhook calls.

fieldset.name: clientes_odoo
fieldset.label: Odoo connection
fieldset.description: Configure the connection to your Odoo instance for Mis Clientes.

field.name: odoo_url
field.label: Odoo URL
field.description: Full URL to your Odoo XML-RPC endpoint.

field.name: odoo_db
field.label: Database name
field.description: Your Odoo database name.

field.name: odoo_user_id
field.label: User ID
field.description: Odoo user ID (numeric).

field.name: odoo_api_key
field.label: API key
field.description: Odoo API key for authentication.

field.name: contacts_per_page
field.label: Contacts per page
field.description: Number of contacts to display per page in Mis Clientes.

field.name: cotizacion_destination_url
field.label: Quotation destination URL
field.description: URL where quotation data is sent (opens in a new tab).

field.name: ote_destination_url
field.label: External work order destination URL
field.description: URL where external work order data is sent.

field.name: clientes_list_show_ote
field.label: Show external work order on client list
field.description: When enabled, Mis Clientes shows the external work order wizard button.

field.name: ot_destination_url
field.label: Work order destination URL
field.description: URL where work order data is sent.

field.name: blink_enabled
field.label: Enable Blink payments
field.description: When Yes, the quotation view can create Pay Bi checkout links via the Blink gateway (server-side only).

field.name: blink_base_url
field.label: Blink base URL
field.description: Gateway server URL, e.g. http://blink.grupoimpre.com:3000. BLINK_BASE_URL env var overrides this.

field.name: blink_api_key
field.label: Blink API key (X-API-Key)
field.description: Gateway secret for X-API-Key header (not Pay Bi llave). Must match GATEWAY_API_KEY on Blink server. BLINK_GATEWAY_API_KEY, BLINK_API_KEY, or GATEWAY_API_KEY env var overrides this.

field.name: blink_paybi_usuario
field.label: Pay Bi — merchant email
field.description: EBI Pay Bi merchant usuario (email). PAYBI_USUARIO env var overrides this.

field.name: blink_paybi_clave
field.label: Pay Bi — password
field.description: EBI Pay Bi merchant password. PAYBI_CLAVE env var overrides this. Never logged.
